allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./package.json''\); p.type = ''module''; require\(''fs''\).writeFileSync\(''./package.json'', JSON.stringify\(p, null, 2\) + ''\\n''\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(typeof m, typeof m.default, Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,5\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(typeof m.default\)")
Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(typeof p.parse\)")

Bash(git add .gitignore .env.example AGENTS.md PROFILE_SCHEMA.md README.md electron.vite.config.ts package-lock.json package.json postcss.config.js tailwind.config.js tsconfig.json tsconfig.node.json tsconfig.web.json src/)
Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''docx''\); console.log\(typeof d, Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,5\)\)")
